role_summary: a chartered accountant is responsible for managing accounting, auditing, taxation, and  financial advisory services while ensuring compliance with statutory and regulatory  requirements.
responsibilities: • prepar e and review financial statements as per applicable accounting standards   • manage direct and indirect tax compliance (income tax, gst, tds)   • conduct audits and provide assurance on financial records   • advise management on financial planning, budgeting, and cost  control   • ensure compliance with companies act, income tax act, and gst laws   • support business decision -making through financial analysis
qualifications: • qualified chartered accountant (icai)   • strong knowledge of accounting standards, taxation, and a udit  • analytical and problem -solving skills   • proficiency in accounting software and excel
